title: Cracca brachycarpa
taxonomy: Cracca brachycarpa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is a legume, and its classification is further divided into the genus Cracca and the subfamily Faboideae. The classification of Cracca brachycarpa is still under review, and some sources may group it differently. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification within the plant kingdom.
